title: API Objects and Command Fluency
target: Create, inspect, explain, debug, and independently verify core Kubernetes objects through three isolated graded labs.
deliverables: Retrieval corrections for the object and controller model
Independent timed Pod, Deployment, and Service sprint
Week 1 evidence and PASS, CONDITIONAL, or REPEAT verdict
acceptance: The guided object, debugging, and timed sprint graders pass from fresh seeds
Every workload uses the required pinned image and exact namespace
Deployments are fully rolled out and Services have ready EndpointSlices and HTTP
Each reset deletes only its declared Week 1 namespace
The timed sprint passes within 30 minutes without hidden help
Every assisted, slow, or failed result has a scheduled repeat
